zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de PARTHENAY於大約1218年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯帕特尼時，她的父親Guillaume V de PARTHENAY17歲，母親Aimable de RANCON14歲。她於大約1235年與Pierre III de ROSTRENEN結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1295年享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de PARTHENAY于大约1218年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯帕特尼时，她的父亲Guillaume V de PARTHENAY17岁，母亲Aimable de RANCON14岁。她于大约1235年与Pierre III de ROSTRENEN结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1295年享年79岁。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de PARTHENAY was born about 1218, in Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, her father, Guillaume V de PARTHENAY, was 17 and her mother, Aimable de RANCON, was 14. She married Pierre III de ROSTRENEN about 1235. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1295, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de PARTHENAY est née environ 1218, à Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Guillaume V de PARTHENAY, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Aimable de RANCON, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Pierre III de ROSTRENEN environ 1235. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1295, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de PARTHENAY um 1218 in Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume V de PARTHENAY 17 und ihre Mutter Aimable de RANCON 14. Sie hat um 1235 Pierre III de ROSTRENEN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1295 im Alter von 79 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de PARTHENAY è nata il circa 1218 nel Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume V de PARTHENAY, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Aimable de RANCON, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Pierre III de ROSTRENEN circa 1235. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1295, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de PARTHENAYが約1218年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインデウクス-スevレスパースエナイで生まれた時，父Guillaume V de PARTHENAYは17歳，母Aimable de RANCONは14歳であった。約1235年にPierre III de ROSTRENENと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1295年に79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de PARTHENAY(이)가 대략 1218년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 데우스-스e브레스 파르테나이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume V de PARTHENAY(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aimable de RANCON(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 대략 1235년 Pierre III de ROSTRENEN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1295년 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de PARTHENAY nasceu aproximadamente 1218, em Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Guillaume V de PARTHENAY, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Aimable de RANCON, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Pierre III de ROSTRENEN aproximadamente 1235. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1295, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de PARTHENAY родилась около 1218 г. в местности партенеи, деукс-сeвресь, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume V de PARTHENAY было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Aimable de RANCON, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pierre III de ROSTRENEN около 1235 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1295 г. в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de PARTHENAY nació aproximadamente 1218, en Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Guillaume V de PARTHENAY, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Aimable de RANCON, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Pierre III de ROSTRENEN aproximadamente 1235. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1295, a la edad de 79 años.
